text:
Yusuf Dikec, a Turkish shooter, gained internet fame at the Paris Olympics with his laid-back demeanor and minimalistic approach in the mixed team 10-meter air pistol event. He secured a silver medal and plans for gold at the Los Angeles 2028 Olympics. His style, including shooting with both eyes open, captured wide attention.

Yusuf Dikec’s new swag: Pistol turns to beer can. Elon Musk joins the meme celebration
